arts.ttl: Everton, Leicester City 'put off' swoop for Premier League defender by eye-catching asking price
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly demanding £7m for the services of Kyle Walker-Peters, with Everton and Leicester currently unwilling to pay such a fee for the defender.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen’s first words as an Aston Villa player following move from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Donyell Malen became Aston Villa's first January signing yesterday as he joined from Dortmund for a fee believed to be in the region of €25 million.

arts.ttl: Loic Badé to Aston Villa transfer twist as Monchi claim ‘categorically denied’ by Sevilla director
arts.sum: Sevilla director of football Victor Orta is said to have ‘categorically denied’ Aston Villa transfer chief Monchi visiting the Spanish club for transfer talks. But Estadio Deportivo report Orta ‘categorically denied’ that Monchi had been at Sevilla’s HQ for talks over Badé.

arts.ttl: Claims of Aston Villa-Sevilla defender swap deal rejected
arts.sum: Speculation surrounding a potential exchange deal being on the cards between La Liga outfit Sevilla and their counterparts at Aston Villa has today been firmly shut down. This comes amid…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa will be without five players for Everton as Unai Emery makes David Moyes admission
arts.sum: The latest from the Aston Villa camp ahead of their Premier League trip to Everton tonight

arts.ttl: Manager pretty much confirms player signing for Aston Villa – ‘Source of price’ for all involved
arts.sum: Kasımpaşa manager Hakan Keleş has spoken to the Turkish media ahead of Yasin Özcan’s pending transfer to Aston Villa and has shared his pride over the youngster heading to England. The 18-year-old is on the verge of signing for the Premier League side following reports Kasımpaşa and Aston Villa have come to an agreement. Turkiye The post Manager pretty much confirms player signing for Aston Villa – ‘Source of price’ for all involved appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: New twist in Diego Carlos transfer saga as fresh exit option emerges for Aston Villa man
arts.sum: However, it has now emerged that fellow Turkish Super Lig outfit Galatasaray have approached Villa over a deal for the centre-half, and it seems unlikely that Emery will stand in the player’s way amid claims he has been available for sale in each of the last two transfer windows. The latest update comes from transfer expert Fabrizio Romano, who posted on X: “Galatasaray have approached Aston Villa to ask for Brazilian CB Diego Carlos.

arts.ttl: Everton line-ups for Aston Villa as system and personnel changed for David Moyes return
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Thomas, Chris Beesley, Paul Wheelock)
arts.sum: Our Everton writers select their line-ups for tonight's Premier League match at home to Aston Villa, which will kick-off a new era under David Moyes

arts.ttl: Friedkins set to get their man in January but Everton miss out in favour of Roma
arts.sum: Everton may be set to miss out on the signing of Ajax’s Devyne Rensch, with new sister club Roma getting him instead. That’s according to Gianluca Di Marzio, who reports that the Italian side have an agreement in place with the defender. arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.
